gating_rules: Claude runs only when READY_FOR_CLAUDE_REVIEW.txt exists and a required review trigger is present.
GPT can request Claude by writing YES in CLAUDE_REVIEW_NEEDED and creating READY_FOR_CLAUDE_REVIEW.txt.
Docs/status/schema-only changes are deferred unless GPT explicitly asks.
Same diff-stat hash is not reviewed repeatedly.
Claude output is review input; GPT converts it into a bounded task or marks the task done.
notes: Graph hints cannot become paper candidates without strict review.
Evaluator trust, settlement normalization, and fee/slippage/gas changes are high risk.
Live trading/order/auth/account/private-key/signing/wallet logic is out of scope.
